product: Dashboard pivot tables, filters, and data export improvements
tagline: JSON cell copy paste improvement: JSON objects in table cells now remain expanded when you drag to copy paste.

Parameterized default catalog and schemas: Parameterize the default catalog and schemas when deploying dashboards using Declarative Automation Bundles. capabilities.title: Header height: Specifies the header
capabilities.desc: Header height: Specifies the header height in pixels. Header text wraps to fill the specified height. Overflow text is truncated.

capabilities.title: Default style: Set font color
capabilities.desc: Default style: Set font color, background color, and text formatting (bold, italic, underline) for all column headers.

capabilities.title: Basic (default): Renders values as
capabilities.desc: Basic (default): Renders values as text. Additional formatting options include font colors, font styles, background colors, and…

capabilities.title: Image: Takes a base64-encoded string
